name_en: 💖《Complete with original green box packaging》💖GG Marmont Card Holder. This GG Marmont card holder is crafted in classic, durable black leather, adding a classic piece to the 《Aria- 》 collection. The double-G hardware reinterprets the 1970s belt buckle design in matching resin material. The combination of classic design and monochrome colorway highlights a modern fashion style.

Model: 739500.
Size: 11.5*9*2cm.
Color: Black/Original leather.
